top_signals.title: Ukraine names new top military commander after protests and leadership rift
top_signals.summary: Following days of street protests sparked by a surprise governmental reshuffle ⁠that ousted a popular defense minister, the change also reflects tensions within Ukraine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
